revenue_segments.name: Product Revenue
revenue_segments.commentary: Product revenue increased due to higher sales of hardware products and software licenses.

revenue_segments.name: Subscription and Support Revenue
revenue_segments.commentary: Growth driven by increased demand for subscription services and support.

forward_guidance.text: We expect our revenue to vary from quarter to quarter based on seasonal and cyclical factors.

key_risks.description: Our business is subject to risks from natural disasters and geopolitical unrest, which could impact our supply chain and sales.
Failure to manage growth effectively could adversely affect our operating results.

bull_case: Strong revenue growth in both product and subscription segments indicates robust demand.
High gross margins suggest efficient cost management and strong pricing power.
bear_case: Exposure to geopolitical risks and natural disasters could disrupt operations.
Failure to manage growth effectively could lead to operational inefficiencies.
what_to_watch: Impact of geopolitical and natural disaster risks on supply chain and sales.
Performance of new product offerings and their impact on revenue growth.
data_gaps: EPS estimate for the upcoming quarter is not available.
Specific figures for future revenue guidance are not provided.
